sidebar_grouping.notes: 4 collapsible sections: Observability, Infrastructure, Platform, Admin. Collapse/expand works correctly.

dark_mode_3layer_depth.notes: Visible depth differentiation in dark mode: dark background, lighter cards, elevated dropdowns. Could be more pronounced.

stat_card_trends.notes: Trend arrows visible: Total Nodes ▲+1, Running Pods ▲+5, Clusters ▲+2, Warning Events ▼-3. Warning Events card has amber/yellow emphasis.

critical_cluster_alert_styling.notes: prod-cluster-eks has red border, CRITICAL(1) red label. Red dot indicator visible. Pulsing animation not confirmed from screenshots.

pod_detail_slideover.notes: Slide-over panel opens on pod click showing pod name, status, namespace, node, age, and View Logs button.

pod_namespace_grouping.notes: Pods grouped by namespace: ingress-nginx(1), kube-system(7), voyager(5). Collapsible headers with count badges.

notification_bell_dropdown.notes: Bell dropdown opens showing Notifications header, 3 alert items, Mark all read button, View all alerts link.

settings_tab_navigation.notes: Settings page shows 4 tabs: General, AI Configuration, API Tokens, Clusters. All tabs present and accessible.
